articles.title: Xiaomi officially announces new flagship phone with Leica cameras and large display - Notebookcheck
articles.description: The Xiaomi 17 Max has been confirmed for a May launch in China, with pre-orders already open. The company has teased the device in a light blue colorway, revealing its design language and a few key highlights. Separately, a leak has shown the device in multip…

articles.title: Sony’s new Xperia phone gets an overdue redesign - The Verge
articles.description: The Sony Xperia 1 VIII gets a new look with a refreshed square camera module, but still no US release.

articles.title: WWDC 2026 Preview: Apple Readies Siri Overhaul, AI Updates, and More - TechRepublic
articles.description: Apple’s WWDC 2026 is expected to preview iOS 27, a smarter Siri, broader AI model options, and macOS 27 design refinements.

articles.description: The good news: no 0-days. The bad news: busy week ahead for Microsoft admins

articles.title: Ultralight laptop under 1 kg: Lenovo officially launches ThinkPad X13 Gen 7 - Notebookcheck
articles.description: Lenovo has officially unveiled a new addition to their ThinkPad line: The ultralight Lenovo ThinkPad X13 Gen 7, which has a starting weight of less than 1 kg. The new model launches with both AMD Ryzen 400 and Intel Panther Lake CPUs.
